logical_analytical.burmese_translation: စဉ်းစားဆင်ခြင်မှု၊ ခွဲခြမ်းစိတ်ဖြာမှု
logical_analytical.operational_role: Deconstruction of institutional rhetoric, narrative warfare analysis, and identifying legitimacy laundering.

numerical.burmese_translation: ကိန်းဂဏန်းများကို နားလည်နိုင်စွမ်း
numerical.operational_role: Algorithmic risk score management, mathematical modeling, and Sigmoid function parameterization.

digital_machine.burmese_translation: နည်းပညာ၊ စက်ပစ္စည်းများကို နားလည်မှု
digital_machine.operational_role: Automation, execution of BASH security scripts, and integrity monitoring via SHA-256 validation seals.

memory.operational_role: Static historical data retention; distinct from multi-dimensional real-time intelligence.

cognitive_flexibility.burmese_translation: လျင်မြန်စွာ လိုက်လျောညီထွေ နေနိုင်စွမ်း
cognitive_flexibility.operational_role: Dynamic adjustments to shifting cyber intrusion techniques and real-time narrative adaptation.

street_smart.burmese_translation: ဘဝပညာ ကြွယ်ဝခြင်း
street_smart.operational_role: Intuitive front-line detection of engineering baits, malicious urgency indicators, and advance-fee anomalies.

intra_personal.burmese_translation: မိမိကိုယ်မိမိ သိရှိခြင်း
intra_personal.operational_role: Emotional self-regulation under tactical coercion to preempt structural cognitive breakdown.

persuasive.operational_role: Formulating high-impact strategic dossiers and civil briefings that drive defensive mobilization.

empathic.burmese_translation: ကိုယ်ချင်းစာနိုင်စွမ်း
empathic.operational_role: Executing No-Shame, No-Judgement response frameworks to remove societal stigma from cyber victimization.

neuroplasticity_gym_protocol.axiom: Cognitive defense capability is a trainable structural configuration, not a static limitation.
neuroplasticity_gym_protocol.action: Execute structured daily training iterations across targeted weak nodes to systematically eliminate cognitive vulnerabilities.

advance_fee_anomaly_lockout.condition: Asymmetric payout bait combined with upfront deposit requirement
advance_fee_anomaly_lockout.action: Trigger mandatory 24-hour verification window; intercept network borrowing sequences; execute external audit check.
